title: Pardon Us for Living But the Graveyard Is Full
original_title: The Fleshtones: Pardon Us for Living But the Graveyard Is Full
overview: When a gang of suburban teens stumbled across a bunch of abandoned instruments and formed The Fleshtones little did they know that 30 years later they'll still be struggling to rock - and pay the bills.
